# Braza Cleaning Services

> Professional cleaning company based in Ocoee, Florida, serving Central Florida (Greater Orlando, Lake County, Osceola County and surrounding areas). Family-owned, bilingual (English/Portuguese), licensed and insured. Rated 5.0 stars across 68 reviews. Three core service lines: residential house cleaning, short-term/vacation rental turnover cleaning, and commercial cleaning.

Braza Cleaning Services offers recurring and one-time house cleaning, Airbnb and vacation rental turnover cleaning (with photo reports, 7 days/week, same-day availability), deep cleaning, move-in/move-out cleaning, post-construction cleaning, and commercial/janitorial services. Free quotes are returned in under 2 hours. Contact: (689) 242-7469 (call/text/WhatsApp).

## Services

- [House Cleaning](https://brazacleaning.com/house-cleaning/): Recurring and one-time residential house cleaning across Central Florida.
- [Recurring Cleaning](https://brazacleaning.com/recurring-cleaning/): Weekly, bi-weekly, and monthly maintenance cleaning plans.
- [Deep Cleaning](https://brazacleaning.com/deep-cleaning/): Detailed top-to-bottom cleaning for homes that need a full reset.
- [Move-In Cleaning](https://brazacleaning.com/move-in-cleaning/): Prepare a new home before moving in.
- [Move-Out Cleaning](https://brazacleaning.com/move-out-cleaning/): Lease-end and sale-prep cleaning to recover deposits.
- [Airbnb Cleaning](https://brazacleaning.com/airbnb-cleaning/): Fast guest-to-guest turnover cleaning for Airbnb/VRBO hosts, with photo reports and restocking.
- [Vacation Rental Cleaning](https://brazacleaning.com/vacation-rental-cleaning/): Turnover and reset cleaning for vacation rentals and resort-community properties.
- [Post-Construction Cleaning](https://brazacleaning.com/post-construction-cleaning/): Debris and dust removal after renovation or construction.
- [Commercial Cleaning](https://brazacleaning.com/commercial-cleaning/): Offices, clinics, and business facilities.
- [Janitorial Services](https://brazacleaning.com/janitorial-services/): Ongoing janitorial programs for commercial facilities.
- [Maid Services](https://brazacleaning.com/maid-services/): Professional maid service for residential clients.

## Service areas (city pages)

- [Orlando](https://brazacleaning.com/airbnb-cleaning/orlando/): Vacation rental and residential cleaning in Orlando, FL.
- [Kissimmee](https://brazacleaning.com/airbnb-cleaning/kissimmee/): Vacation rental turnover cleaning near Disney (ChampionsGate, Reunion, Storey Lake, Windsor Hills).
- [Davenport](https://brazacleaning.com/airbnb-cleaning/davenport/): Vacation rental turnover cleaning for Polk County hosts.
- [Winter Garden](https://brazacleaning.com/cleaning-services/winter-garden/): Residential house cleaning in Winter Garden, FL.
- [Windermere](https://brazacleaning.com/cleaning-services/windermere/): House cleaning in Windermere and Horizon West (Isleworth, Keene's Pointe).
- [Clermont](https://brazacleaning.com/house-cleaning/clermont/): House cleaning in Clermont and South Lake County.
- [Minneola](https://brazacleaning.com/cleaning-services/minneola/): Residential cleaning in Minneola, FL.
- [The Villages](https://brazacleaning.com/cleaning-services/the-villages/): House cleaning for The Villages, FL.
- [Ocoee](https://brazacleaning.com/cleaning-services/ocoee/): House cleaning in Ocoee, FL (home base).
